{{Quote|Reports are coming in of a major battle between Sikan forces and invading Chekut troops on the Sika homeworld. The Sikan administration has called for Galactic Alliance forces to intervene in what it calls 'an act of opportunist aggression,' and share prices have tumbled over fears that the invasion will draw more planets in the Expansion Region into the conflict.|[[HoloNet News and Entertainment|HNE]] newsflash|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice">''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''</ref>}}
The '''Chekut''' were a race of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings that were native to the [[Cheku system/Legends|Cheku system]].

The Chekut forces opportunistically invaded the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sika]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1stm}}
